name: Description of the Windows
title: Description of the Windows
intro: Panels are configured in the working area.
Every time a new panel is opened, a tab appears (this means that multiple panels can be edited in parallel).
All available symbols are shown in the Symbol Explorer.
They can be assigned to an open panel using drag and drop.
The panel overview of the Panel Designer lists controls which are integrated into the currently selected panel.
In the tabular overview, you can
All available controls are displayed in the toolbox.
They can be assigned to an open panel using drag and drop or by double-clicking.
The Properties Window lists all settings associated with the currently selected control.
When a setting is selected, a brief description of it appears at the bottom of the Properties Window.
Messages on the currently active panel are displayed in the Output Window, e.g. if controls are not linked with the existing symbols.
intro_tables: Working Area Panels are configured in the working area. Every time a new panel is opened, a tab appears (this means that multiple panels can be edited in parallel).
Symbol Explorer All available symbols are shown in the Symbol Explorer. They can be assigned to an open panel using drag and drop.

Panel Overview The panel overview of the Panel Designer lists controls which are integrated into the currently selected panel. In the tabular overview, you can quickly identify which symbols are assigned to which controls assign symbols to the controls find controls which are hidden or located outside the panel
Toolbox All available controls are displayed in the toolbox. They can be assigned to an open panel using drag and drop or by double-clicking.

Properties The Properties Window lists all settings associated with the currently selected control. When a setting is selected, a brief description of it appears at the bottom of the Properties Window.
Output Window Messages on the currently active panel are displayed in the Output Window, e.g. if controls are not linked with the existing symbols.
